specialist_owned_evidence: narrow specialty boundary and routing rules
knowledge lifecycle and article-quality scenario set
shared meta-agent request and fallback contracts

notes: Boundary remains narrowly focused on ITSM knowledge lifecycle, article quality, searchability, reuse, and support-knowledge governance.
Authority sources are public, authoritative, and tracked with refresh cadence plus decay policy in the manifest.
Deployment and commercialization artifacts are present and aligned to the validated contract.
Shared meta-agent use is contract-defined and safe to defer on demand with specialist-owned fallback behavior.
